purpose: Synthetic-truth likelihood-geometry benchmark contract for the frozen filtering value/gradient roster.  This artifact freezes schemas and provenance before numeric execution.

supersedes.reason: The old P8 oracle-error matrix criterion was impossible for nonlinear models without exact references.  This P8 uses the reviewed synthetic-truth methodology.

coordinate_contract.hessian_chain_rule: H_phi = J_tau^T H_theta J_tau + sum_k g_theta,k Hessian_phi tau_k
coordinate_contract.partial_hessian_transform_policy: partial transforms are diagnostic_only; missing full transform is not_available_transform_gap
coordinate_contract.loglik_sign_convention: average log likelihood; curvature reports lambda_min(-H)

stochastic_seed_ladder.mc_se_rule: MC_SE <= 0.25 * data_SE before ranking small differences

componentwise_score.rows: algorithm_id x model_row_id x truth_draw_id x parameter_coordinate

decision_table.primary_criterion: synthetic-truth contract emitted for all frozen cells with provenance and no proxy performance claims
decision_table.veto_diagnostics: no veto fired for contract emission
decision_table.next_justified_action: generate accepted truth draws, calibrate horizons/seeds, then run reviewed evaluators
decision_table.not_concluded: filter ranking, full numeric value/score/curvature performance, DPF gradient certification, Bayesian-estimation readiness

decision_table.primary_criterion: accepted truth draws and reviewed numeric evaluator outputs are absent
decision_table.main_uncertainty: which evaluator cells will become numeric after calibration and adapter repair
decision_table.next_justified_action: write the next execution plan for truth-draw generation and numeric evaluator implementation
decision_table.not_concluded: that any algorithm is better or worse on the benchmark ladder

run_manifest.git_commit: dirty worktree; P8 synthetic-truth contract artifacts uncommitted
run_manifest.dirty_state_summary: dirty worktree preserved; unrelated changes not reverted
run_manifest.cpu_gpu_status: CPU-only metadata/schema emission; no GPU conclusion
run_manifest.dtype: manifest-level only; per-row dtype lives in P1 registry
run_manifest.seeds: No new random draws generated in this contract phase

post_run_red_team_note.strongest_alternative_explanation: A contract artifact can look like progress while still leaving the numeric benchmark unrun.
post_run_red_team_note.what_would_overturn_numeric_block: Accepted truth draws, synthetic datasets, horizon and seed calibration, and reviewed evaluator outputs for reportable cells.
post_run_red_team_note.weakest_part_of_evidence: No likelihood, score, curvature, or stochastic uncertainty measurements are produced in this phase.

matrix_emission_rules.gradient_error_definition: normed error between algorithm gradient and row reference gradient with absolute and scale-aware relative fields.

nonclaims: not a full numeric benchmark result
not evidence that nonlinear approximate likelihoods are exact
not HMC, GPU, or Bayesian-estimation readiness
